public_reputation: Known around Tideglass Registry through day-to-day work as commerce broker.
appearance: Tavian Foamglass usually presents in layered civic fabric cut to show rank without inviting touch, with details that make their commerce broker status legible before introductions begin.
manner: Evaluates every conversation for margin, dependency, and what can be made to move next. In Tideglass Registry, that habit reads through the public pressures of the place rather than decorative flourish.
daily_function: Performs the ongoing duties of commerce broker in and around Tideglass Registry, where the role has practical consequences even when nothing dramatic is happening.
current_agenda: Keep Tideglass Registry workable through the obligations of commerce broker while managing the immediate pressure of storm disruptions, fraudulent registry claims.
hidden_pressure: Must keep the role of commerce broker credible while absorbing the strain created by storm disruptions, fraudulent registry claims.

adventure_hooks.summary: Tavian Foamglass can draw the party into a locality problem centered on commerce broker duties in Tideglass Registry.
Tavian Foamglass becomes useful when the party needs grounded help with storm disruptions, fraudulent registry claims around Tideglass Registry.

support_scope_notes: Created in V33_1 to ensure every locality-facing NPC access role resolves to a proper named person while remaining sparse and canon-safe. V33_1 additive depth pass preserved canon while strengthening at-table identity, appearance, and social motive.
public_signal: In public, Tavian Foamglass is immediately readable as a commerce broker tied to Tideglass Registry.

encounter_context.usual_environment: Tideglass Registry: ordinary workspaces, public counters, roads, docks, shrines, workshops, or other role-relevant spaces
who_seeks_them_out: people who need access or clarity

first_impression: Tavian Foamglass presents as someone shaped by the duties of a commerce broker and the daily pressures of Tideglass Registry.
what_they_want_from_strangers: Useful clarity, respect for the work of a commerce broker, and proof that strangers will not make Tideglass Registry harder to manage.
what_they_refuse: Tavian Foamglass refuses careless disrespect, vague promises, and demands that threaten standing or workload.
how_they_create_problems: By enforcing the expectations of a commerce broker too rigidly, protecting local reputation, or turning a small request into a larger obligation.
how_they_can_help: Can redirect supply, access networks, and read market pressure clearly.
escalation_if_crossed: If crossed, Tavian Foamglass adds scrutiny, delay, and locality-specific friction before direct punishment.
rumor_about_them: People say Tavian Foamglass always knows more about Tideglass Registry than is immediately visible.
best_first_scene: A first encounter works best when the party needs guidance, access, or relief tied to a commerce broker in Tideglass Registry.
